category_sources: source_facts.description says Apache Derby is an embedded relational database running on the JVM.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description names Apache Derby; source_facts.homepage is the official Apache Derby site.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Apache Derby site; /docs is the dedicated official documentation path.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from the official Apache Derby source repository location.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an embedded relational database running on JVM; source_facts.executables lists Derby tools.
